architecture_notes: Keep StagingRecovery as a facade over the separate peer-side staging operation families.

children.name: SwapRecovery
children.responsibility: Recover user-data SWAP directories before live entries are listed or before a target path is replaced.

children.name: BakDisplacement
children.responsibility: Move displaced user entries into the correct nearby BAK timestamp directory while preserving directory subtrees.

children.name: TmpStagingPaths
children.responsibility: Create transfer TMP staging paths under the supplied parent directory without replacing live user paths.

children.name: StagingCleanup
children.responsibility: Remove only expired BAK and TMP timestamp directories for one peer and parent directory after traversal work at that level.
